description: Text card on a deep navy-blue textured (wood-grain-like) background. In the upper-left is the round white U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal (eagle with shield) beside three lines of white serif text reading 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement'. A thin dark-red horizontal rule runs full-width beneath the header. Centered below in very large bold white serif capitals is the headline 'FOR THE RECORD'. Beneath that, in large centered white serif type spanning four lines, is the body statement: 'Contrary to rumors, ICE is not giving a $750 reward for tips in support of civil immigration enforcement objectives.' There are no photos or illustrations.
notable_text: FOR THE RECORD | Contrary to rumors, ICE is not giving a $750 reward for tips in support of civil immigration enforcement objectives.
